CustomField.description: Optional Slack channel override for the Watcher digest (Block Kit channel field). When blank, defaults to the channel the configured SlackWebhookUrlTxt__c webhook lands in. Avoids forcing operators to configure a second webhook just to redirect Watcher output.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Slack channel name (with or without leading #). Blank = use the default channel of SlackWebhookUrlTxt__c.
CustomField.label: Watcher Digest Slack Channel
